title: oenothera amoena f. roseoalba
intro: Oenothera amoena f. roseoalba, also known as the evening primrose, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Onagraceae. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its rich content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an essential omega-6 fatty acid. The health benefits of Oenothera amoena f. roseoalba include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and premenstrual syndrome. The plant is often prepared as a herbal supplement in capsule or oil form, or infused in teas and tinctures for its medicinal properties.
